scope.name: Content BE remainder + reporting BE + session FE

qualityGate.stubs_note: 3 cosmetic warnings only — stale UC-references in code-comments of SessionDetailPage.tsx, $sessionId.tsx, workflows.ts; underlying code is functional
qualityGate.tests_backend: 941/941 passing pre-UC-103-FE (Docker turned off mid-wave for FE work — re-run required after Docker restart to confirm baseline)
qualityGate.typecheck: clean across packages/shared, frontend, backend (verified during UC-103-FE)
qualityGate.graph_terminal_check: SKIPPED — neo4j MCP disconnected mid-wave; graph status updates are best-effort per conductor protocol

notes: Direct git strategy: each UC committed straight to main on PASS.
Order: UC-105-BE (read) → UC-106-BE (SSE) → UC-107-BE (cancel) → UC-108-BE (download) → UC-401-BE (report) → UC-103-FE (session view).
Pure-BE UCs use phases {be, sync, review, qa}. UC-103-FE includes sync check (PASS).

UC-401-BE was patched after review for 2 MAJOR items: (1) cost precision drift — formatCost now always toFixed(2); (2) spec divergence — api-contract/acceptance/task-be updated to use FORBIDDEN (platform-wide convention from TECH-005 requireRole) instead of ADMIN_REQUIRED.

Neo4j MCP disconnected mid-wave — graph status updates skipped per conductor 'best-effort' contract. Docker daemon also stopped before final BE test re-run; pre-FE backend was 941/941 green. Re-run npm test under Docker before release.
Wave 4 closes MVP backend feature set: read, notify, cancel, download, report — and seeds session-view FE. Wave 5 = user-facing FE for UC-104..108 + UC-401.
